历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 49037 → 51825 → 56064 → 57150 → 61528, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12491 places in the past 5 years and about 5464 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 61528, with the backward shift accelerating; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei was 113 in 2021, 121 in 2022, 121 in 2023, 142 in 2024, and 144 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan for Physics Category is 122, and for Medical Category (available to Physics Category students) is 21, totaling 143, a slight decrease of 1 compared to 144 in 2025, essentially flat, with the expansion trend temporarily slowing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is about 180–198, ranking 198th in 2025, and not entering the top 200 in 2026, ranking relatively low among 211 universities, positioning it in the middle to lower tier; no significant positive or negative events were found in the university's reputation and public opinion documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 49565, low short video exposure, and limited application attention; no records of admission gaps were found; Qinghai University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall weak disciplinary strength, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society; the university offers related majors but they are not rated in discipline evaluations; the total number of Hebei Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 609800, with Physics Category estimated at about 355500, a decrease of about 7540 (about 2.1%) compared to 363040 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, a remote western university, which has a certain regional preference disadvantage for Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 2.3%–3.0%, a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments.\nConsidering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the essentially flat enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates, and the relatively low university level, competition is expected to slightly ease based on the 2025 baseline of 61528; the predicted minimum ranking is about 61072, with a range of 60572–61572.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Hebei Province over the past five years are: 2021: 49037 (planned 13 students), 2022: 51825 (planned 13 students), 2023: 49919 (planned 14 students), 2024: 57150 (planned 16 students), 2025: 59117 (planned 20 students). Overall, there is a continuous upward trend, with rankings rising from approximately 49,000 to 59,000, reflecting increasing competition in medical applications year by year. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 21 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 5%. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the expansion has a certain downward effect on rankings, but the impact is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. As the only 211 university in Qinghai Province, its medical department has a certain influence in the northwest region, with clinical medicine and other majors enjoying a high reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm nationwide, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Qinghai University is located in the northwest, and regional factors make it slightly less attractive to Hebei candidates compared to similar universities in the east, but the 211 and Double First-Class labels still attract a considerable number of Hebei candidates. The province's medical enrollment scale is relatively small (over 20 students), with a tight supply-demand relationship.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in Hebei Province in 2026 will be approximately 61091, a slight increase (ranking number larger) compared to 2025, reflecting the continued heating up of medical application enthusiasm but with the expansion of 1 student providing some buffer. The expected admission range is between 60591 and 61591.
